hero.subtitle: CDN · Live Streaming · Infrastructure Hosting
hero.description: A professional web platform company offering CDN acceleration, live streaming setup, and infrastructure hosting as an all-in-one solution. In deep partnership with BytePlus and Cloudflare to build efficient and stable digital infrastructure for enterprises.

services.title: Core
services.description: From CDN acceleration to live streaming, from infrastructure to security — we provide comprehensive digital infrastructure solutions

cdn.title: CDN Acceleration
cdn.desc: Leveraging both BytePlus and Cloudflare CDN networks for ultra-fast global content delivery, reducing latency and enhancing user experience.

livestream.title: Live Streaming Setup
livestream.desc: One-stop live streaming solution from ingest, transcoding to distribution — delivering stable HD streaming for e-commerce, events, and gaming.

infra.title: Infrastructure Hosting
infra.desc: Enterprise-grade infrastructure hosting including server configuration, monitoring, and backup management — so you can focus on your core business.

web.title: Web Platform Development
web.desc: From corporate websites to e-commerce platforms — comprehensive planning, design, development, and deployment to create your digital presence.

security.title: Security Solutions
security.desc: Integrated Cloudflare WAF, SSL certificate management, intrusion detection, and comprehensive security services to protect your digital assets.

storage.title: Cloud Storage
storage.desc: Enterprise-grade storage solutions built on BytePlus cloud architecture with high availability and scalability for massive media resource management.

partners.title: Official
partners.description: Deep collaboration with world-leading technology platforms to deliver the most competitive technical services

byteplus.name: BytePlus
byteplus.desc: ByteDance's enterprise technology brand offering CDN acceleration, live streaming, cloud storage, and other global solutions. As an authorized partner, we provide the most favorable access plans.
byteplus.features: Global Content Delivery,Live Streaming Tech,Cloud Storage Solutions,Real-time Analytics

cloudflare.name: Cloudflare
cloudflare.desc: The world's leading network security and CDN provider, protecting over 25% of internet traffic. Through our partnership, enterprises enjoy exclusive plans and priority technical support.
cloudflare.features: Global CDN Acceleration,DDoS Protection,Web Application Firewall,Zero Trust Security

livestream.title: Professional
livestream.description: From technology selection to platform launch — complete live streaming solutions to help enterprises enter the streaming market

f1.title: Ultra HD Streaming
f1.desc: Support for 1080P / 4K ultra-clear streaming with adaptive bitrate, ensuring the best viewing experience for every viewer.

f2.title: Ultra-Low Latency
f2.desc: Millisecond-level WebRTC streaming technology with interaction delay as low as 500ms, making live interactions feel face-to-face.

f3.title: Multi-Platform Distribution
f3.desc: One-click simultaneous streaming to multiple major platforms, reaching audiences across different platforms to maximize exposure.

f4.title: Real-time Dashboard
f4.desc: Real-time monitoring of viewer count, engagement rate, and revenue data, providing comprehensive live streaming analytics.

f5.title: Monetization System
f5.desc: Built-in virtual gifts, paid subscriptions, and tipping system to help you quickly build a sustainable live streaming business model.

f6.title: Copyright Protection
f6.desc: Multi-layer encrypted stream protection against unauthorized recording and piracy, safeguarding your live content copyright.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Leave the infrastructure to the experts — we handle everything underneath so you can focus on creating business value

i1.title: Dedicated Server Hosting
i1.desc: Full-service hosting for physical servers, VPS, and cloud servers — from procurement and rack installation to daily operations.
i1.badges: Latest Intel Xeon Processors,Enterprise NVMe SSD Storage,Redundant Multi-Route Bandwidth

i2.title: Hybrid Cloud Architecture
i2.desc: Combining on-premises and cloud resources to design flexible, scalable hybrid cloud architecture with optimized costs.

i3.title: 24/7 Operations Monitoring
i3.desc: Round-the-clock system monitoring from hardware health to application performance with instant alerts to ensure business continuity.
i3.badges: 5-min Heartbeat Checks,Smart Alert System,Fast Response SLA

i4.title: Database Management
i4.desc: Complete setup, optimization, backup, and disaster recovery services for MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and other major databases.
i4.badges: Automated Backup Scheduling,Primary-Replica Architecture,Performance Tuning Consulting

infrastructure.ctaTitle: Ready to hand over your infrastructure to us?
infrastructure.ctaDesc: Free assessment of your current architecture with a custom migration and hosting plan

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Whatever your questions or needs, our professional consulting team is always ready to provide the best solutions
